identity.name: EstateCommand
identity.description: A high-density, professional dashboard for property brokers who value data over decoration. Every pixel serves a purpose.

primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, sidebar active items

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full border-r bg-background z-50

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow hover:bg-primary/90 h-9 px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground shadow-sm hover:bg-secondary/80 h-9 px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 py-2
buttons.destructive: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground shadow-sm hover:bg-destructive/90 h-9 px-4 py-2

cards.stats_card: rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm p-6 flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2

inputs.base: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

status_badges.active: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700
status_badges.pending: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-amber-100 text-amber-700
status_badges.inactive: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-slate-100 text-slate-700
status_badges.error: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-red-100 text-red-700

images.description: Modern living room, used for property thumbnails or dashboard placeholders
Building exterior, used for property main images
Professional woman, used for user/tenant avatars
Portrait woman, used for owner/tenant avatars

assets.icons: Use lucide-react for all icons. Common icons: LayoutDashboard, Users, Home, FileText, CreditCard, Receipt, LogOut, Settings, Plus, Search, Filter, Trash2, Edit, ChevronDown, Check

visual_enhancers.glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm border-white/20 (Use sparingly, mainly for sticky headers)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Use slate-500 or darker on white backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings (focus-visible:ring-1).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/JS for logic but style HEAVILY with Tailwind classes defined above.
For the sidebar, create a Layout component that wraps the pages.
Use Recharts for the dashboard charts (BarChart for expenses, PieChart for occupancy).
Implement 'sonner' for toast notifications on success/error actions.
For file uploads (Police Verification), use a drag-and-drop zone style with dashed border.
Authentication: Store JWT in localStorage. Create a PrivateRoute component to protect admin routes.
Use axios for API calls. Create a centralized api instance with interceptors for JWT injection.
Mock data if backend is not ready, but structure it to match expected MongoDB schemas.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
